lines.zh: 給我一個理由就好
lines.kuso: Just give me a reason
lines.romaji: Just give me a reason

lines.zh: 讓這顆心繼續跳動
lines.kuso: To keep my heart beating
lines.romaji: To keep my heart beating

jp.t: Don't worry it's safe right here in my arms

lines.zh: 別擔心 在我懷裡很安全
lines.kuso: Don't worry it's safe right here in my arms
lines.romaji: Don't worry it's safe right here in my arms

jp.t: As the world falls apart around us

lines.zh: 即使世界在我們身邊崩塌
lines.kuso: As the world falls apart around us
lines.romaji: As the world falls apart around us

jp.t: All we can do is hold on, hold on

lines.zh: 我們能做的 只有緊緊抓住、不要放手
lines.kuso: All we can do is hold on, hold on
lines.romaji: All we can do is hold on, hold on

lines.zh: 牽起我的手
lines.kuso: Take my hand
lines.romaji: Take my hand

lines.zh: 帶我回來吧
lines.kuso: And bring me back
lines.romaji: And bring me back

jp.t: I risk everything if it's for you

lines.zh: 為了你 我願意賭上一切
lines.kuso: I risk everything if it's for you
lines.romaji: I risk everything if it's for you

lines.zh: 我向夜裡輕聲低語
lines.kuso: I whisper into the night
lines.romaji: I whisper into the night

jp.t: Telling me it's not my time and don't give up

lines.zh: 告訴我時候未到 不要放棄
lines.kuso: Telling me it's not my time and don't give up
lines.romaji: Telling me it's not my time and don't give up

jp.t: I've never stood up before this time

lines.zh: 我從未像這次這樣挺身而出
lines.kuso: I've never stood up before this time
lines.romaji: I've never stood up before this time

lines.zh: 但那些不能退讓的 緊握的這雙手 絕不放開
lines.kuso: 爹魔 友資雷奈伊摸諾 你哥踏 摳諾忒哇 哈那撒奈伊
lines.romaji: demo yuzurenai mono nigitta kono te wa hanasanai

jp.t: So stand up, stand up (Just gotta keep on running)

lines.zh: 所以站起來 站起來（只能繼續向前奔跑）
lines.kuso: So stand up, stand up (Just gotta keep on running)
lines.romaji: So stand up, stand up (Just gotta keep on running)

jp.t: Wake up, wake up (Just tell me how I can)

lines.zh: 醒過來 醒過來（告訴我該怎麼做）
lines.kuso: Wake up, wake up (Just tell me how I can)
lines.romaji: Wake up, wake up (Just tell me how I can)

lines.zh: 絕不放棄
lines.kuso: Never give up
lines.romaji: Never give up

lines.zh: 近乎瘋狂 那悽切的豔麗
lines.kuso: 哭嚕喔系 后兜 些茲奈伊 諾 ㄝㄣ雷伊
lines.romaji: kuruoshii hodo setsunai no enrei

lines.zh: 告訴我為什麼吧 寶貝
lines.kuso: Just tell me why baby
lines.romaji: Just tell me why baby

lines.zh: 他們或許會說我瘋了
lines.kuso: They might call me crazy
lines.romaji: They might call me crazy

jp.t: For saying I'd fight until there is no more

lines.zh: 因為我說過 要戰到再無餘地為止
lines.kuso: For saying I'd fight until there is no more
lines.romaji: For saying I'd fight until there is no more

lines.zh: 含著哀愁的閃光眼神 是感官深處的衝動
lines.kuso: 烏雷伊喔 福哭嗯達 賢口 干口哇 砍卡哭忒key 修兜
lines.romaji: urei wo fukunda senkou gankou wa kankakuteki shoudou

jp.t: Blinded, I can't see the end

lines.zh: 視線被蒙蔽 看不見終點
lines.kuso: Blinded, I can't see the end
lines.romaji: Blinded, I can't see the end

lines.zh: 那我又該從何開始？
lines.kuso: So where do I begin?
lines.romaji: So where do I begin?

jp.t: Say another word, I can't hear you

lines.zh: 再說一句吧 我聽不見你
lines.kuso: Say another word, I can't hear you
lines.romaji: Say another word, I can't hear you

lines.zh: 我們之間的沉默
lines.kuso: The silence between us
lines.romaji: The silence between us

lines.zh: 只是看起來像什麼都沒發生
lines.kuso: 那膩摸 奈伊友膩 烏資忒嚕 達ㄍㄝ
lines.romaji: nani mo nai you ni utsutteru dake

jp.t: I take this chance that I make you mine

lines.zh: 我抓住這機會 把你變成我的
lines.kuso: I take this chance that I make you mine
lines.romaji: I take this chance that I make you mine

lines.zh: 只是把那些藏不住的 偽裝得像裝飾一樣
lines.kuso: 踏達 卡哭些奈伊摸諾 卡咂踏 友膩 米些卡ㄍㄝ忒嚕
lines.romaji: tada kakusenai mono kazatta you ni misekaketeru

jp.t: So stand up, stand up (Just gotta keep on running)

lines.zh: 所以站起來 站起來（只能繼續向前奔跑）
lines.kuso: So stand up, stand up (Just gotta keep on running)
lines.romaji: So stand up, stand up (Just gotta keep on running)

jp.t: Wake up, wake up (Just tell me how I can)

lines.zh: 醒過來 醒過來（告訴我該怎麼做）
lines.kuso: Wake up, wake up (Just tell me how I can)
lines.romaji: Wake up, wake up (Just tell me how I can)

lines.zh: 絕不放棄
lines.kuso: Never give up
lines.romaji: Never give up

lines.zh: 悲傷與淒切交織的豔麗
lines.kuso: 卡那系米 投 些茲那撒 諾 ㄝㄣ雷伊
lines.romaji: kanashimi to setsunasa no enrei

lines.zh: 給我一個理由就好
lines.kuso: Just give me a reason
lines.romaji: Just give me a reason

lines.zh: 讓這顆心繼續跳動
lines.kuso: To keep my heart beating
lines.romaji: To keep my heart beating

jp.t: Don't worry it's safe right here in my arms

lines.zh: 別擔心 在我懷裡很安全
lines.kuso: Don't worry it's safe right here in my arms
lines.romaji: Don't worry it's safe right here in my arms

lines.zh: 碎裂、哭泣、綻放、凋零之後 這份思念又會如何
lines.kuso: 哭達ㄍㄝ忒 奈伊忒 撒伊忒 七踏拉 摳諾 喔某伊哇
lines.romaji: kudakete naite saite chittara kono omoi wa

jp.t: So blinded I can't see the end

lines.zh: 如此盲目 看不見終點
lines.kuso: So blinded I can't see the end
lines.romaji: So blinded I can't see the end

jp.t: Look how far we made it

lines.zh: 看我們已經走了多遠
lines.kuso: Look how far we made it
lines.romaji: Look how far we made it

jp.t: The pain i can't escape it

lines.zh: 這份痛苦 我無法逃離
lines.kuso: The pain i can't escape it
lines.romaji: The pain i can't escape it

jp.t: わらせることはできないでしょ

lines.zh: 就這樣下去 還無法畫上句點吧
lines.kuso: 摳諾媽媽甲 媽達 喔哇拉些嚕 摳投哇 爹key奈伊 爹休
lines.romaji: kono mama ja mada owaraseru koto wa dekinai desho

lines.zh: 無論幾近死去多少次 即便就此腐朽 也沒有所謂的終點
lines.kuso: 難兜 哭踏巴里搜 爹某 哭七哈忒友 投某 喔哇里哇 奈伊撒
lines.romaji: nando kutabarisou demo kuchihate you tomo owari wa nai sa

lines.zh: 那我該從哪裡開始？
lines.kuso: So where do I begin?
lines.romaji: So where do I begin?

lines.zh: 緊緊握住 為了不要失去...
lines.kuso: 你哥里系妹踏 烏系那哇奴 友膩投...
lines.romaji: nigirishimeta ushinawanu you ni to...

lines.zh: 一旦張開手 似乎就會灑落
lines.kuso: 忒喔 西樓ㄍㄝ雷巴 摳玻雷喔七搜 爹
lines.romaji: te wo hirogereba koboreochi sou de

lines.zh: 捨棄那些 沒什麼好失去的日常惰性
lines.kuso: 烏系那烏 摸諾那兜 那卡踏 西比諾 達些伊喔 思忒忒
lines.romaji: ushinau mono nado nakatta hibi no dasei wo sutete

lines.zh: 把你...
lines.kuso: key米喔...
lines.romaji: kimi wo...

lines.zh: 告訴我為什麼吧 寶貝
lines.kuso: Just tell me why baby
lines.romaji: Just tell me why baby

lines.zh: 他們或許會說我瘋了
lines.kuso: They might call me crazy
lines.romaji: They might call me crazy

jp.t: For saying I'd fight until there is no more

lines.zh: 因為我說過 要戰到再無餘地為止
lines.kuso: For saying I'd fight until there is no more
lines.romaji: For saying I'd fight until there is no more

lines.zh: 含著哀愁的閃光眼神 是感官深處的衝動
lines.kuso: 烏雷伊喔 福哭嗯達 賢口 干口哇 砍卡哭忒key 修兜
lines.romaji: urei wo fukunda senkou gankou wa kankakuteki shoudou

jp.t: Blinded, I can't see the end

lines.zh: 視線被蒙蔽 看不見終點
lines.kuso: Blinded, I can't see the end
lines.romaji: Blinded, I can't see the end

jp.t: Look how far we made it

lines.zh: 看我們已經走了多遠
lines.kuso: Look how far we made it
lines.romaji: Look how far we made it

jp.t: The pain i can't escape it

lines.zh: 這份痛苦 我無法逃離
lines.kuso: The pain i can't escape it
lines.romaji: The pain i can't escape it

jp.t: わらせることはできないでしょ

lines.zh: 就這樣下去 還無法畫上句點吧
lines.kuso: 摳諾媽媽甲 媽達 喔哇拉些嚕 摳投哇 爹key奈伊 爹休
lines.romaji: kono mama ja mada owaraseru koto wa dekinai desho

lines.zh: 無論幾近死去多少次 即便就此腐朽
lines.kuso: 難兜 哭踏巴里搜 爹某 哭七哈忒友 投某
lines.romaji: nando kutabarisou demo kuchihate you tomo

lines.zh: 也沒有所謂的終點
lines.kuso: 喔哇里哇 奈伊撒
lines.romaji: owari wa nai sa

lines.zh: 一切才終於開始。
lines.kuso: It finally begins.
lines.romaji: It finally begins.
